config.serverUrl.description: Inference server URL (OpenAI API compatible endpoint)
config.serverUrl.markdownDescription: Inference server URL (OpenAI API compatible endpoint). **Deprecated**: Use `providers` configuration instead.
config.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for authentication (optional). **Deprecated**: Use `providers` configuration instead.
config.defaultMaxTokens.description: Default maximum input tokens for models (context window)
config.defaultMaxTokens.markdownDescript: Default maximum input tokens for models (context window). Used as fallback when model-specific config is not provided. Default: 32768
config.defaultMaxOutputTokens.descriptio: Default maximum output tokens for models
config.defaultMaxOutputTokens.markdownDe: Default maximum output tokens for models. Used as fallback when model-specific config is not provided. Default: 4096
config.enableToolCalling.description: Enable tool calling capability for models
config.enableToolCalling.markdownDescrip: Enable tool calling capability for models. Default: true
config.parallelToolCalling.description: Allow model to call multiple tools in parallel
config.parallelToolCalling.markdownDescr: Allow model to call multiple tools in parallel (disable if model has issues with parallel calls). Default: true
config.agentTemperature.markdownDescript: Temperature for agent/tool calling mode (lower = more consistent tool call formatting). Set to 0.0 for best results with fine-tuned models. Default: 0.0
config.providers.markdownDescription: Provider configurations. See documentation for format.
config.showProviderPrefix.description: Show provider prefix in model selector
config.showProviderPrefix.markdownDescri: Show provider prefix in model selector (e.g., 'bailian/qwen3.5-plus'). Default: true
config.providerNameStyle.markdownDescrip: Provider name display style: 'slash' (provider/model) or 'bracket' ([provider] model). Default: slash
config.configMode.markdownDescription: Model information source mode: config-only (use config only), config-priority (config overrides API), api-priority (API with config fallback). Default: config-priority
config.enableDebugLogs.description: Enable detailed debug logs for token counting
config.enableDebugLogs.markdownDescripti: When enabled, outputs detailed token counting logs to the LLM Gateway output channel. Default: false
config.enableTokenStatistics.description: Enable token usage statistics and status bar display
config.enableTokenStatistics.markdownDes: When enabled, displays current session token usage percentage in the status bar and allows manual context compression. Default: false
command.testConnection.title: Test Server Connection
command.openConfig.title: Open Configuration
command.reloadConfig.title: Reload Configuration
command.addProvider.title: Add Provider
command.editProvider.title: Edit Provider
command.removeProvider.title: Remove Provider
command.showTokenUsage.title: Show Token Usage Details
view.tokenUsage.name: Token Usage
view.tokenUsage.welcome:
No active chat session.
Start chatting to see token usage statistics.
command.compressContext.title: Compress Chat Context
extension.description: Connect GitHub Copilot to open-source models via vLLM or any OpenAI-compatible server
token.compressDescription: Clear history to reduce token usage
token.contextCompressed: Chat history cleared to reduce token usage
token.statusBarTooltip:
Token Usage: {0} / {1} ({2}%)
Click for details & compress
token.compressConfirmMessage:
Token Usage: {0} / {1} tokens

Compress context to reduce token usage?
